description_long: This is a tall, rectangular metal filing cabinet with a matte black frame and four vertically stacked drawers on the front. Each drawer features a brass or gold-toned handle and a matching rectangular label holder, giving the cabinet a classic, utilitarian appearance. The sides and back of the cabinet are solid and unadorned, finished in a uniform dark color. The drawers are likely designed to slide out, providing storage for documents or files. The cabinet stands upright and is compact in width and depth, making it suitable for placement against a wall or in a corner. Its robust construction suggests it is built for durability and frequent use in environments where secure document storage is needed.
description: A tall, black metal filing cabinet with four gold-toned handled drawers and label holders, designed for secure document storage. The sides and back are plain and solid, emphasizing its utilitarian style.
description_view_0: Front view showing four gold-toned handled drawers with label holders, all vertically aligned.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, solid black surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, solid black back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain, solid black surface, mirroring the left side.
